_comment: Items physically manifested by Exemplar ikons (worn + weapon). Body ikons are imbued on the body and grant no item. Each weapon/worn ikon grants one level-0 mundane item per the 'providence ensures you come across these items' lore. Player can swap via the shop; this seeds the loadout. For weapon ikons, the `eligibleWeapons` list constrains the player's choice to weapons matching the ikon's canonical category — see StepGear's ikon-weapon picker.

bands-of-imprisonment.name: Bands (bracers/anklets/circlet)
bands-of-imprisonment.note: Worn ikon — Exemplar's ikon manifested as a heavy adornment that hones discipline.

fetching-bangles.name: Fetching Bangles
fetching-bangles.note: Worn ikon — bracers that gleam with your magnetism.

horn-of-plenty.name: Horn of Plenty (bag/gourd/cornucopia)
horn-of-plenty.note: Worn ikon — vessel storing potions/elixirs; produces a temporary elixir of life daily.

mirrored-aegis.name: Mirrored Shield
mirrored-aegis.note: Worn ikon — any shield, polished to reflect spiritual and ethereal attacks.

pelt-of-the-beast.name: Pelt (cloak or belt)
pelt-of-the-beast.note: Worn ikon — animal hide as cloak or belt; daily-chosen elemental resistance.

skybearers-belt.name: Skybearer's Belt
skybearers-belt.note: Worn ikon — girdle that magnifies your strength.

thousand-league-sandals.name: Thousand-League Sandals
thousand-league-sandals.note: Worn ikon — threadbare but trustworthy footwear; +10 ft Speed.

victors-wreath.name: Victor's Wreath (laurel or sash)
victors-wreath.note: Worn ikon — symbol of triumph; headwear or belt-sash.

gleaming-blade.name: Gleaming Blade
gleaming-blade.note: Weapon ikon — sword or knife group weapon.

hands-of-the-wildling.name: Wildling's Hands
hands-of-the-wildling.note: Weapon ikon — tattooed fists, savage claws, or powerful gauntlets. No carried weapon required.

mortal-harvest.name: Mortal Harvest
mortal-harvest.note: Weapon ikon — sickle, axe, flail, or polearm group.

noble-branch.name: Noble Branch
noble-branch.note: Weapon ikon — staff, bo staff, fighting stick, khakkara, or spear/polearm.

shadow-sheath.name: Shadow Sheath
shadow-sheath.note: Weapon ikon — sheath for a one-handed thrown weapon of light Bulk.

titans-breaker.name: Titan's Breaker
titans-breaker.note: Weapon ikon — club, hammer, or axe group, or bludgeoning unarmed.
